Name: Antigen
Description: The antigenic base strain ID of the outbreak infection.

Name: Genome
Description: The genome ID of the outbreak infection. Together with the clade ID (**Clade**) they represent an infection as a unitary object. Values for **Genome** may range from -1 to 2\ :sup:`Log2_Number_of_Genomes_per_Clade-1`. Set this to -1 to create a random number generator.

Name: Import_Age
Description: The age (in days) of imported individuals.

Name: Number_Cases_Per_Node
Description:
The number of new imported individuals.

.. note::

This will increase the population with demographics of 50/50 male/female and user-defined ages

Name: Probability_Of_Infection
Description: The probability that new individuals are infected. 1.0 implies all new individuals are infected while 0.0 adds all of the people as susceptible individuals.
